crossRefs.label: Remove air cleaner (for vehicles without turbo charger)

blocks.text: 2. Remove air cleaner (for vehicles without turbo charger)

refs.label: Remove air cleaner (for vehicles without turbo charger)

blocks.text: Remove the thermostat cover (A) and remove the thermostat (B). Remove the mounting rubber (C) from the thermostat.
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

items: Mounting rubber must not interfere with jiggle pins.
The thermostat must be installed with the jiggle pin (A) facing up.

items.text: Mounting rubber must not interfere with jiggle pins.
Mounting rubber must not interfere with jiggle pins.
The thermostat must be installed with the jiggle pin (A) facing up.
The thermostat must be installed with the jiggle pin (A) facing up.

blocks.text: Place the thermostat (A) in the water. Heat the water and gradually increase the water temperature to test the valve opening temperature. Opening temperature (at 0.35mm lift) 80－84°C Temperature at full open 95°C Lift at full open 8.0 mm or more

items: The thermostat should be replaced when the valve is even slightly open at room temperature.
The thermostat should be kept at around 98°C for about 5 minutes to measure the valve opening lift because the surface area of the sensing part is small and there is a time delay.
The thermostat should not touch the bottom of the container directly.
